parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Specifies which Bitrise Project you want to get associated apps for

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Filter for a specific mobile platform between your apps

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by bundle ID (for iOS), package name (for Android), or app title. (case sensitive)

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: Specifies the maximum number of apps returned per request

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Specifies which page should be returned from the whole result set in a paginated scenario
